forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon then becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 12 and 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.

Mostly sunny morning. The chance of morning fog in the north. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly 25 to 35 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 13.
Partly cloudy. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Mostly sunny morning. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning westerly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. High chance of showers in the west, medium chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning westerly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 14.
Mostly sunny. The chance of morning frost south of Keith. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h turning west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Mostly sunny. Patches of frost and the chance of fog this morning. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the north. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then turning west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then tending west to northwesterly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northerly 15 to 20 km/h turning west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the east. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the late afternoon then becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 12 and 17.
Sun protection 12:30pm to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the east. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the east. Slight chance of a shower. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the day then becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning westerly 20 to 30 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog on and east of the ranges. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 14 and 18.
Sun protection 11:20am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog on and east of the ranges. Slight chance of a shower. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning westerly 25 to 35 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, becoming less likely in the late morning. The chance of morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection 11:30am to 1:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog west of Ceduna. Medium chance of showers east of Ceduna, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers east of Ceduna, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers east of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning west to southwesterly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection 12:00pm to 1:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning westerly 25 to 35 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 17.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of fog in the early morning. Medium chance of showers. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly 25 to 40 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers east of Coober Pedy, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 16 and 19.
Sun protection 11:00am to 2:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 4 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog west of Coober Pedy. Medium chance of showers east of Stuart Highway, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming north to northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending west to northwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers south of Woomera, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Medium chance of showers north of Leigh Creek, most likely this evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 16 and 21.
Sun protection 10:50am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. High chance of showers north of Leigh Creek, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm east of Leigh Creek. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers about the Gammon Ranges, slight chance elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog east of Leigh Creek. Medium chance of showers east of Leigh Creek, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 22.
